Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to identify anomalies per case: check typical P2P flow: Create Requisition -> Approve Requisition -> Issue PO -> Receive Goods -> Vendor Invoice Received -> Match Invoice to PO -> Release Payment -> Close. Also sometimes Match Invoice before receiving goods (but typical is after receipt). Also Release Payment after match.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1001: Sequence matches standard: Create, Approve, Issue PO, Receive Goods, Vendor Invoice Received, Match Invoice, Release Payment, Close. All good.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1002: Sequence: Create Requisition, Issue Purchase Order (no approval before PO), Vendor Invoice Received (before Approve PR and before Receive Goods), Release Payment (before approval of PR, before receiving goods, before matching), Approve Purchase Requisition (after payment), Receive Goods (after payment), Match Invoice to PO (after goods receipt), Close. Anomalies: PO issued without requisition approval; invoice received before PR approval and before goods receipt; payment released before PR approval, before goods receipt, before invoice matching; also payment before matching (should be after match). So several issues.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1003: Sequence: Create, Approve, Issue PO, Release Payment (very early, before receiving goods, before invoice, before match), Vendor Invoice Received (after payment), Receive Goods (after invoice), Match Invoice to PO (after goods receipt), Close. Anomalies: Payment released before receiving goods and before invoice; also before matching; payment should be after match. Also invoice received after payment (unusual). Also goods receipt after invoice (should be before). So anomalies.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1004: Sequence: Create, Approve, Receive Goods (before PO issue!), Issue Purchase Order (after goods receipt), Vendor Invoice Received (after PO issue), Match Invoice to PO (after invoice), Release Payment, Close. Anomaly: Receiving goods before PO issued (i.e., goods received without PO). Also PO after goods receipt is out of order. Also matching after invoice is fine, but goods receipt before PO is problematic.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus we need to explain each anomaly and why problematic: lack of control, risk of unauthorized purchases, mismatched invoices, early payment risk, fraud, inventory discrepancies, etc.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We should present in answer: list anomalies per case, description, why problematic. Make sure to follow style: clear, concise.
